title: jijAcraft 100M Butchers String, 328ft White Cotton String, 2MM Natural Food Grade Cooking Cord, Butchers Twine for Kitchen Rotisserie Chicken, Tying Meat, Making Sausage
features: 【Durable Cotton String】Our white string is made from high-quality cotton, making it soft, durable, and resistant to breaking. It is perfect for use as kitchen twine, cooking string, or butcher's twine. Safe, healthy, and eco-friendly, it’s a great choice for all your cooking needs.
【2MM Butchers String】This butcher’s twine is 2mm thick which is made of 3-ply cotton and measures 328 feet (100 meters) in length. It's strength and length make it suitable for a wide range of uses.

【Convenient to Use】The parcel cotton string rolls up neatly, allowing you to cut it easily to your desired length, ensuring practicality and convenience for all your culinary and crafting requirements.
【Cooking Twine】Offering endless possibilities, this natural food-grade cooking twine is perfect for tying meat, trussing a turkey, making sausages, baking, and other kitchen tasks.
【DIY Crafting String】This cotton string comes in many colors, can be used for crafts projects, gift wrapping, hanging tags, gardening, holiday ornaments, scrapbooking.
